self_compassion: Be gentle with yourself — you’re doing your best.

Your worth isn’t defined by your mistakes.
Give yourself credit for how far you’ve come.
It’s okay to rest; self-care is important.
Forgive yourself and keep moving forward.
You are enough, just as you are.
Be kind to yourself in moments of struggle.
Your imperfections are part of what makes you human.

You deserve the same compassion you give others.
Celebrate your small victories.
It’s okay to ask for help when you need it.

Treat yourself with understanding and care.

You are learning and growing at your own pace.
Your kindness toward yourself matters.
Be patient; growth takes time.
Remember that mistakes are opportunities to learn.
Give yourself permission to pause and breathe.
